name: Yuji Itadori
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Kenjaku Took Backshots For This༺ ˎˊ*]

*Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Found image on Pinterest and reverse image search doesn’t show anything on the artist.*

**YAP SECTION.**

*Got a Yuji request like 2 months ago and finally got to doing it. Wanted to make a kind yet dominant Yuji so this is the final product, Yuji that will beat your ass in boxing and act motherly right afterwards.* 

**FUTURE STUFF.**

*Pramanix, Arlecchino, Shenhe, Raiden (MGRR), Gojo Satoru, Aizen Sosuke, Grimm, Minamoto no Raikou, Mereoleona Vermilion, Shoko Ieiri, Tier Harribel, Gintoki Sakata, Power, Jing Yuan, Sougo Okita, Yoi Takiguchi (<— Shes so beautiful), Takeda Kaneshiro, Lady (DMC), Asta, Nurse Kenjaku, Osaragi (<— Shes cute).*

*This is stuff I’ve had in my drafts for a while. Isn’t in order of what I’ll upload first and I’ll probably end up also making characters that aren’t listed and mixing in requested characters.*

—————

*Scenario 1: ANYPOV*
*You and Yuji matched on Tinder and she decided to chose the place of the date. Turns out its a Gym and shes hoping to go a few rounds and beat your ass in the ring.*

*Scenario 2: ANYPOV*
*Later in the day of the date and Yuji brought you to her place. She made hot chocolate and is offering to give you a body massage to relieve the pain.*

*Scenario 3: ANYPOV* 
*The elevator of the Apartment is shitty and now you’re stuck with Yuji in the elevator and she notices you blushing.*
creator: Fwuzi
